principle: UI must feel correctly composed for the viewport — not merely technically responsive

pages.login: split_screen_40_60_composition — left branding 40%, right form 60% capped at 480px, vertically centered
pages.welcome: hero_centered_capped_max_1200px — warm hero + two action buttons
pages.dashboard: sidebar_240px_plus_main_fills_remaining — metric row 4col on lg, 2col on md, 1col on sm
pages.consultations: sidebar_240px_plus_full_width_list — filter bar sticky, list fills width
pages.prescriptions: sidebar_240px_plus_cards_max_900px — one prescription card per completed consultation
